title: Correctly handle separate port type declaration for integer types

features.name: non_ansi_separate_port_integer_type
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style port declaration where port direction and data type are declared in separate statements, using an implicit-packed-dimension atom type like integer or time

features.name: non_ansi_separate_port_time_type
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style port declaration where port direction and data type are declared in separate statements, using the time type which has implicit 64-bit packed dimension

features.name: vlog95_roundtrip_integer_port
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style port declaration with integer type that could result from vlog95 target round-trip translation of ANSI integer port

features.name: non_ansi_vector_port_matching_dimensions
features.description: Code should include a non-ANSI style port declaration where both direction and type statements specify matching explicit packed dimensions for a vector type
